active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
verification_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_core_memory_store.py::test_init_db_upgrades_existing_core_memory_schema_before_stamping_head -q -> RED exit 1 before fix, then 1 passed in 0.73s after fix

uv run pytest -q -> 372 passed, 1 warning in 557.50s
uv run ruff check . -> All checks passed

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 10 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge -> report .memoryos/evals/public_20260521_235024_locomo.json
